policy_yaml:
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule approval-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "ask_user" since write "**"
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "multi-file changes need explicit user approval for the full changeset"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-commit-without-instruction:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "do not commit unless the user explicitly instructs it"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule ask-before-writing:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "ask May I write this to the filepath before using Write or Edit tools"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule installer-tests-required:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/installer/**" or write "__tests__/installer-targets.test.ts"
    notify write file "src/installer/**" if AGENT
    because "installer changes need matching coverage in __tests__/installer-targets.test.ts"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule windows-validation-vm:
    block exec "prlctl" "exec" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "ssh" since write "**"
    because "Windows-specific work must be validated on the real Windows VM over SSH"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule windows-npm-ci-local:
    block exec "npm" "ci" if AGENT
    because "for Windows validation clone into C:/dev/codegraph and run npm ci there, not against the shared Mac repo"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule copied-assets-required:
    notify write file "src/db/schema.sql" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/extraction/wasm/**" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/db/schema.sql" or write "src/extraction/wasm/**" or write "dist/**"
    because "new SQL or grammar wasm must be copied into dist by copy-assets before shipping"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-publish-shared-state:
    kill exec "npm" "publish" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "tag" if AGENT
    because "do not run publish actions on shared state; write files and hand commands to the user"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule installer-rollout-coverage:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/installer/**" or write "CHANGELOG*" or write "__tests__/**"
    notify write file "src/installer/**" if AGENT
    because "installer changes need test coverage and a changelog entry during the 0.7.x rollout"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule mcp-instructions-parity:
    notify write file "src/mcp/server-instructions.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/installer/instructions-template.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file ".cursor/rules/codegraph.mdc" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/mcp/server-instructions.ts" or write "src/installer/instructions-template.ts" or write ".cursor/rules/codegraph.mdc"
    because "MCP tool instructions must stay in sync across all three instruction files"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule pr-preflight-required:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT unless after exec "pr-preflight.sh"
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT unless after exec "pr-preflight.sh" since write "**"
    because "run scripts/pr-preflight.sh before implementation work or PR actions"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-bd-edit:
    kill exec "bd" "edit" if AGENT
    notify exec "bd" "update" if AGENT
    notify exec "bd" "create" if AGENT
    because "bd edit is interactive; use bd update or bd create with flags or stdin"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule default-test-command:
    notify exec "go" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "make" "test" if AGENT
    because "default local tests are make test or ./scripts/test.sh"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule icu-test-command:
    notify exec "go" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "make" "test-icu-path" if AGENT
    because "use make test-icu-path or ./scripts/test-icu-path.sh for the opt-in ICU regex path"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule shipped-config-cgo-tests:
    notify exec "go" "test" if AGENT
    because "for shipped-config package or test scoped runs use CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags gms_pure_go ./cmd/bd/..."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule noninteractive-file-ops:
    notify exec "cp" if AGENT
    notify exec "mv" if AGENT
    notify exec "rm" if AGENT
    because "use non-interactive flags such as cp -f, mv -f, rm -f, rm -rf, and cp -rf"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule scp-batchmode:
    notify exec "scp" if AGENT
    because "use scp -o BatchMode=yes so it fails instead of prompting"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule ssh-batchmode:
    notify exec "ssh" if AGENT
    because "use ssh -o BatchMode=yes so it fails instead of prompting"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule apt-get-yes:
    notify exec "apt-get" if AGENT
    because "use apt-get with the -y flag for non-interactive operation"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule brew-no-auto-update:
    notify exec "brew" if AGENT
    because "set HOMEBREW_NO_AUTO_UPDATE=1 when running brew"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule landing-workflow:
    notify exec "git" "pull" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "status" if AGENT
    notify exec "bd" if AGENT
    because "ending a session requires issues, quality gates, issue updates, git pull --rebase, git push, clean status, cleanup, verification, and handoff"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule work-complete-after-push:
    notify exec "git" "status" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "work is not complete until git push succeeds and status is up to date with origin"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-stop-before-push:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "never stop before pushing; otherwise work remains stranded locally"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule retry-push:
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "if push fails, resolve the cause and retry until it succeeds"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bd-only-tracking:
    block write file "**/TODO*.md" if AGENT
    block exec "gh" "issue" if AGENT
    notify exec "bd" if AGENT
    because "use bd for all issue tracking, not markdown TODOs or other trackers"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule check-ready-work:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT unless after exec "bd"
    notify exec "bd" "ready" if AGENT
    because "check ready work with bd ready --json before starting"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bd-create-json:
    notify exec "bd" "create" if AGENT
    because "create issues with bd create using --json, proper priority, dependencies, and stdin for special descriptions"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bd-update-json:
    notify exec "bd" "update" if AGENT
    because "claim and update issues with bd update --claim or field flags and --json"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bd-close-json:
    notify exec "bd" "close" if AGENT
    because "complete work with bd close --reason and --json"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bd-agent-workflow:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT unless after exec "bd"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "bd" since write "**"
    because "AI-agent workflow is bd ready, inspect metadata, claim, work, create linked issues, and close done work"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source CHARTER = file "docs/PROJECT_CHARTER.md"

  rule read-project-charter:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT and not CHARTER
    because "read docs/PROJECT_CHARTER.md before adding new feature surface area"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule use-bd-tracking:
    block exec "gh" "issue" if AGENT
    block write file "**/TODO*.md" if AGENT
    notify exec "bd" if AGENT
    because "use bd for all task tracking"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bd-json-programmatic:
    notify exec "bd" if AGENT
    because "always include --json for programmatic bd use"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule discovered-from-links:
    notify exec "bd" "create" if AGENT
    because "link discovered work with discovered-from dependencies"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bd-ready-before-asking:
    notify exec "ask_user" if AGENT unless after exec "bd"
    notify exec "bd" "ready" if AGENT
    because "check bd ready before asking what to work on"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-markdown-todos:
    block write file "**/TODO*.md" if AGENT
    block write file "**/todo*.md" if AGENT
    because "do not create markdown TODO lists"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-external-trackers:
    block exec "gh" "issue" if AGENT
    block exec "jira" if AGENT
    block exec "linear" if AGENT
    because "do not use external issue trackers; use bd"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-duplicate-tracking:
    block write file "**/TODO*.md" if AGENT
    block exec "gh" "issue" if AGENT
    notify exec "bd" if AGENT
    because "do not duplicate tracking systems; keep work in bd"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source CONTRIBUTING = file "CONTRIBUTING.md"

  rule read-contributing-before-prs:
    notify exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT and not CONTRIBUTING
    because "read CONTRIBUTING.md before handling external PRs"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source PRGUIDE = file "PR_MAINTAINER_GUIDELINES.md"

  rule read-maintainer-pr-guide:
    notify exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT and not PRGUIDE
    because "read PR_MAINTAINER_GUIDELINES.md before triaging, landing, or closing PRs"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule create-brand-workflow:
    block write file "skills/ppt-master/templates/brands/**" if AGENT unless after exec "create-brand"
    notify exec "create-brand" if AGENT
    because "brand setup or brand extraction must use the create-brand workflow and output to templates/brands/id"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule visual-review-explicit-only:
    notify exec "visual-review" if AGENT
    because "run visual-review only after an explicit per-page visual review request, never automatically"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source PPTSKILL = file "skills/ppt-master/SKILL.md"

  rule read-ppt-skill:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT and not PPTSKILL
    because "read skills/ppt-master/SKILL.md before PPT generation tasks or repo modification"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule topic-research-needed:
    notify exec "topic-research" if AGENT
    notify write file "projects/**" if AGENT unless after exec "topic-research"
    because "topic-only PPT requests need the topic-research workflow before Step 1"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule resume-execute-workflow:
    notify write file "projects/**" if AGENT unless after exec "resume-execute"
    notify exec "resume-execute" if AGENT
    because "fresh-chat continuation of projects/x should enter Phase B via resume-execute"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule verify-charts-workflow:
    notify write file "projects/**" if AGENT unless after exec "verify-charts"
    notify exec "verify-charts" if AGENT
    because "decks containing data charts need verify-charts before post-processing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule generate-audio-workflow:
    notify exec "generate-audio" if AGENT
    notify write file "projects/**" if AGENT
    because "recorded narration or video export should run generate-audio after post-processing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule animation-customization:
    block write file "**/animations.json" if AGENT unless after exec "customize-animations"
    notify exec "customize-animations" if AGENT
    because "only create animations.json or tune object animations when customization was requested"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule live-preview-workflow:
    notify exec "live-preview" if AGENT
    notify write file "projects/**" if AGENT unless after exec "live-preview"
    because "when live preview or slide element selection is requested, run the live-preview workflow"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule statusline-setup:
    notify write file "**/.claude/settings.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/plugin.json" if AGENT
    notify exec "claude-hud:setup" if AGENT
    because "configure StatusLine through /claude-hud:setup in settings.json; statusLine is not valid in plugin.json"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule build-and-smoke-test:
    notify exec "npm" "ci" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" "build" if AGENT
    notify exec "node" if AGENT
    because "build with npm ci, npm run build, and smoke-test dist/index.js with sample stdin"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule new-sandbox-provider:
    notify write file "agent/integrations/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "agent/utils/sandbox.py" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "agent/integrations/**" or write "agent/utils/sandbox.py"
    because "new sandbox providers must be added under agent/integrations and wired into SANDBOX_FACTORIES"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule new-tools-wiring:
    notify write file "agent/tools/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "agent/tools/__init__.py" if AGENT
    notify write file "server.py" if AGENT
    notify write file "reviewer.py" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "agent/tools/**" or write "server.py" or write "reviewer.py"
    because "new tools must be exported and added to get_agent tools or reviewer-only tools"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule new-middleware-wiring:
    notify write file "agent/middleware/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "agent/middleware/__init__.py" if AGENT
    notify write file "server.py" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "agent/middleware/**" or write "server.py"
    because "new middleware must be exported and added to get_agent middleware in the correct order"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule dashboard-routes:
    notify write file "agent/dashboard/routes.py" if AGENT
    because "new dashboard endpoints belong in agent/dashboard/routes.py, which is auto-mounted"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule graph-registration:
    notify write file "langgraph.json" if AGENT
    because "new graphs must be registered under graphs in langgraph.json"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule io-batch-concurrency:
    notify exec "gh" if AGENT
    notify exec "curl" if AGENT
    notify exec "dig" if AGENT
    notify exec "docker" if AGENT
    because "multi-URL and multi-API batches need concurrency N, 4-8 for I/O and 1 for CPU or shared-state commands"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule output-files-only:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "write artifacts to files and return the file path with a one-line description; do not inline artifacts"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule memory-before-asking:
    notify exec "ask_user" if AGENT unless after exec "ctx_search"
    notify exec "ctx_search" if AGENT
    because "on resume, search persistent memory before asking the user"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule think-in-code:
    notify exec "cat" if AGENT
    notify exec "sed" if AGENT
    notify exec "grep" if AGENT
    notify exec "jq" if AGENT
    notify exec "ctx_execute" if AGENT
    because "for analyze, count, filter, compare, search, parse, or transform tasks, write JavaScript code through ctx_execute and print only the answer"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-curl-wget:
    kill exec "curl" if AGENT
    kill exec "wget" if AGENT
    because "curl and wget are blocked; use ctx_fetch_and_index or ctx_execute with fetch"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-inline-http:
    block connect endpoint "*" if AGENT
    because "inline HTTP calls such as fetch or requests are blocked; use ctx_execute so only stdout enters context"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-webfetch-direct:
    block connect endpoint "*" if AGENT
    because "WebFetch is blocked; use ctx_fetch_and_index and then ctx_search"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule bash-use-sandbox:
    notify exec "bash" if AGENT
    notify exec "sh" if AGENT
    because "for bash that would produce large output, use ctx_batch_execute or ctx_execute shell sandbox; keep direct bash to allowed simple commands"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule read-analysis-sandbox:
    notify open file "**" if AGENT
    because "when reading for analysis or summarization, use ctx_execute_file instead of loading raw file data into context"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule grep-sandbox:
    notify exec "grep" if AGENT
    because "grep may flood context; run it through ctx_execute shell sandbox"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule context-tool-selection:
    notify exec "cat" if AGENT
    notify exec "grep" if AGENT
    notify exec "curl" if AGENT
    notify exec "wget" if AGENT
    notify exec "ctx_batch_execute" if AGENT
    notify exec "ctx_execute" if AGENT
    because "use ctx_search for memory, ctx_batch_execute for gathering, ctx_execute for processing, ctx_fetch_and_index for web, and ctx_index for indexing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule tests-before-pr:
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "**"
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "**"
    because "all npm tests must pass before opening a PR or pushing"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule mcp-tool-consistency:
    notify write file "src/mcp/tools-registry.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/mcp/server.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/triggers/api.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/index.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "test/mcp-standalone.test.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "README.md" if AGENT
    notify write file "plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/mcp/tools-registry.ts" or write "src/mcp/server.ts" or write "src/triggers/api.ts" or write "src/index.ts" or write "test/mcp-standalone.test.ts" or write "README.md" or write "plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json"
    because "adding or removing MCP tools requires registry, server, REST, index, test, README, and plugin manifest updates"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule rest-endpoint-consistency:
    notify write file "src/triggers/api.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/index.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "README.md" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/triggers/api.ts" or write "src/index.ts" or write "README.md"
    because "adding REST endpoints requires API registration, index log count, and README endpoint counts"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule version-bump-consistency:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/version.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/types.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/functions/export-import.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "test/export-import.test.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "package.json" or write "src/version.ts" or write "src/types.ts" or write "src/functions/export-import.ts" or write "test/export-import.test.ts" or write "plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json"
    because "version bumps must update package, version/type unions, supported versions, tests, and plugin manifest"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule kv-scope-consistency:
    notify write file "src/state/schema.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/types.ts" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/state/schema.ts" or write "src/types.ts"
    because "new KV scopes require schema and matching TypeScript interfaces"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule audit-operation-consistency:
    notify write file "src/types.ts" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/types.ts"
    because "new audit operations must be added to AuditEntry.operation in src/types.ts"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule prefer-gh-cli:
    notify exec "git" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" if AGENT
    because "prefer gh CLI over raw git for PRs, issues, checkout, and related GitHub operations where possible"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule shared-agent-sources:
    notify write file ".agents/commands/**" if AGENT
    notify write file ".agents/skills/**" if AGENT
    block write file ".claude/commands/**" if AGENT
    block write file ".cursor/commands/**" if AGENT
    block write file ".claude/skills/**" if AGENT
    because "command and skill definitions live in .agents; Claude and Cursor command and skill paths should be symlinks"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule shared-mcp-config:
    notify write file ".mcp.json" if AGENT
    block write file ".cursor/mcp.json" if AGENT
    notify write file ".codex/config.toml" if AGENT
    notify write file "opencode.json" if AGENT
    because "keep shared MCP servers in .mcp.json, link Cursor config to it, and mirror for Codex and OpenCode"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule mastra-upstream-deps:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "bun.lock*" if AGENT
    block write file "patches/**" if AGENT
    because "use published upstream mastracode and @mastra packages; avoid fork tarballs or custom patch steps unless requested"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule plan-doc-placement:
    block write file "apps/*/*_PLAN.md" if AGENT
    block write file "apps/*/src/**/*_PLAN.md" if AGENT
    block write file "src/**/*_PLAN.md" if AGENT
    notify write file "plans/**" if AGENT
    because "plans go in plans or app-scoped plans, shipped plans in plans/done, and architecture docs in app docs"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule lint-before-push:
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "bun" since write "**"
    notify exec "bun" "lint:fix" if AGENT
    notify exec "bun" "lint" if AGENT
    because "fix Biome warnings with bun run lint:fix and verify bun run lint exits zero before git push"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule ask-user-tool:
    notify exec "ask_user" if AGENT
    because "ask every user question through the ask_user tool so the UI surfaces the interactive overlay"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-production-db-touch:
    block exec "psql" if AGENT
    block exec "mysql" if AGENT
    block exec "drizzle" if AGENT
    block exec "neon" if AGENT
    because "never touch the production database unless explicitly asked and confirmed with the user"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule neon-branch-for-migrations:
    block exec "drizzle-kit" if AGENT unless after exec "neon" since write "packages/db/src/schema/**"
    block exec "bunx" "drizzle-kit" if AGENT unless after exec "neon" since write "packages/db/src/schema/**"
    notify write file ".env*" if AGENT
    because "DB migrations require a fresh neon branch and root env files pointed at that branch"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-run-migration-yourself:
    block exec "drizzle-kit" "migrate" if AGENT
    block exec "drizzle" "migrate" if AGENT
    notify exec "bunx" "drizzle-kit" if AGENT
    because "use drizzle to manage migrations but do not run migrations yourself"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule drizzle-generate-only:
    notify write file "packages/db/src/schema/**" if AGENT
    notify exec "bunx" "drizzle-kit" if AGENT
    notify exec "drizzle-kit" "generate" if AGENT
    because "create migrations by changing drizzle schema and running bunx drizzle-kit generate with a snake_case name"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule no-manual-drizzle-edits:
    block write file "packages/db/drizzle/**" if AGENT
    because "never manually edit generated drizzle migrations, journal, or snapshot files; modify schema and ask the user to generate"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule next16-proxy-not-middleware:
    block write file "**/middleware.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/proxy.ts" if AGENT
    because "Next.js 16 uses proxy.ts for request interception; never create middleware.ts"

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule biome-root-lint:
    notify exec "biome" if AGENT
    notify exec "bun" "lint:fix" if AGENT
    notify exec "bun" "lint" if AGENT
    because "Biome runs at root level; use bun run lint:fix for auto-fixes and bun run lint for checks"
